MINI MINUTES FOR MAY-13-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT VENTURE HEMP WINTER LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES, THE TENTATIVE RULING IS ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR. THE MOVING PARTY FAILED TO COMPLY WITH CCP 430.41 BECAUSE THERE IS NO DECLARATION STATING THAT THE PARTIES MET AND CONFERRED PRIOR TO THIS FILING. PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION CONFIRMS THAT THERE WAS NO COMPLIANCE WITH THIS REQUIREMENT. THE DEMURRER IS THEREFORE OFF CALENDAR AND THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO IMMEDIATELY MEET AND CONFER. DEFENDANT VENTURE HEMP WINTER LLC'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY JUNE 11, 2021. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER; CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA; COURT REPORTER: ROSE MILLER, CSR NO. 5041, EMAIL: RMILLERCSR@GMAIL.COM. (302/RBU)

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ELIZABETH L. HURWITZ, Esq. of Ad Astra Law Group, LLP (Tel: 415-795-3579) for the plaintiff;
Atty. ROBERT MACK, Esq. of Kurlander, Burton & Mack (Tel: 415-392-8920) for defendant Venture Hemp Winter, LLC.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT VENTURE HEMP WINTER LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court takes the matter under submission.

The Court instructs plaintiff's counsel to email a proposed order to contestdept302tr@sftc.org which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964 (302/RBU)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2021 Continued To Aug-25-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-13-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT VENTURE HEMP WINTER LLC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

No appearances, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

Off calendar. The moving party failed to comply with CCP 430.41 because there is no declaration stating that the parties met and conferred prior to this filing. Plaintiff's opposition confirms that there was no compliance with this requirement. The demurrer is therefore off calendar and the parties are ordered to immediately meet and confer. Defendant VENTURE HEMP WINTER LLC's response to the complaint is now due by June 11, 2021.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
